# AI-Crawler-Blocklist
# Generated: 2026-07-03T14:32:07Z
# Source: https://github.com/ipanalytics/AI-Crawler-Blocklist
# Policy: official/operator-published sources only
# WARNING: Review before hard drop. Search crawlers may affect visibility.
Amazonbot
Amzn-SearchBot
Amzn-User
anthropic-ai
Baiduspider
ByteSpider
Bytespider
CCBot
ChatGPT-User
Claude-SearchBot
Claude-User
ClaudeBot
DuckAssistBot
FacebookBot
GPTBot
meta-externalagent
meta-externalfetcher
meta-webindexer
MistralAI-User
OAI-AdsBot
OAI-SearchBot

PerplexityBot
PetalBot
